subcodes.first_line: The grace hath been sent down, the heavenly table hath appeared, and knowledge and wisdom have shone forth. Blessed is the servant who hath attained, and woe unto every denier [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت النعمة و ظهرت المآئدة و برزت العلم و الحکمة طوبی لعبد فاز و ویل لکل
